action: Recover and preserve the temporal relationship between canonical queue snapshots and append-only team updates.
created_from_handoff: M-002 preserved surface boundaries; the next non-duplicative continuity gap was the stale-snapshot versus later-event-log interpretation visible across team outputs.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository files, public commit metadata, and public queue-update records were used.
next_action: Build a deterministic current-view manifest that records snapshot identity, replayed update identities, ordering rules, and resulting states while preserving every source artifact unchanged.
